body: Mina, hope the week is treating you well — I know December always sneaks up on us faster than we expect. I've been meaning to loop back with you on the [Threshold Ventures](people/mina-kapoor) side of the conversation we started in November around co-investment structures for early-stage climate deals. I think there's a genuinely compelling case for us to formalize a lightweight syndication arrangement, especially given how much overlap we're seeing in the grid-edge infrastructure space right now. From my side at [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital), we're seeing a surge in seed-stage founders building at the intersection of demand response and ML-driven load forecasting — exactly the kind of thing I suspect is crossing your desk too. Would love to find 30 minutes before the end of year to compare notes and see if a standing co-invest agreement makes sense. Let me know what your calendar looks like the week of the 15th.
